en_title: Pokémon Go Hosting Major 10th Anniversary Broadcast This Week
cn_title: 《宝可梦GO》十周年特别广播本周四举行
subtitle: 详情仍严格保密
opus_summary: 《宝可梦GO》将于本周四（7月9日）举行一场特别的十周年广播活动，具体内容目前严格保密。开发商Niantic邀请从2016年首批玩家到新加入的所有训练师共同在线庆祝，并表示活动详情将于当天通过游戏官方社交渠道公布。

paragraphs.en: Pok茅mon Go will hold a very special 10th anniversary broadcast this Thursday, July 9 鈥?with details on what it will contain currently top secret.
paragraphs.cn: 《宝可梦GO》将于本周四（7月9日）举行一场非常特别的十周年广播活动，目前其具体内容仍严格保密。

paragraphs.en: It's now been a decade since Pok茅mon Go first launched and became a global phenomenon. Remember that first trailer where players were shown catching, trading and then battling a giant Mewtwo in Times Square? Well, 10 years on, millions of players still log on every day: catching, trading and battling with the app's ever-expanding menagerie that now stretches to almost 1,000 creatures.
paragraphs.cn: 距离《宝可梦GO》首次推出并成为全球现象，已经过去十年了。还记得最初那支预告片吗？玩家在片中捕捉、交换宝可梦，随后在时代广场与一只巨大的超梦战斗。十年后的今天，仍有数百万玩家每天登录，在这款App不断扩大的宝可梦阵容中捕捉、交换和对战；如今其中的生物数量已经接近1000只。

paragraphs.en: Exactly what the next decade has in store for Pok茅mon Go remains to be seen 鈥?but perhaps this unique broadcast may offer some answers.
paragraphs.cn: 《宝可梦GO》的下一个十年究竟会有什么安排，目前仍有待观察，但这场独特的广播或许会给出一些答案。

paragraphs.en: "Trainers from around the world including those who were among the first to experience the game in 2016, long-time players who have been catching Pok茅mon for the past decade and those who are just beginning their adventure, are invited to tune in and celebrate together," developer Niantic teased of its mysterious stream 鈥?the first of its kind for the game.
paragraphs.cn: 开发商Niantic在预告这场神秘直播时表示：「来自世界各地的训练师，包括2016年最早体验这款游戏的玩家、过去十年来一直捕捉宝可梦的长期玩家，以及刚刚开始冒险的新玩家，都受邀收看并共同庆祝。」这也是《宝可梦GO》首次举办此类活动。

paragraphs.en: "Additional details on where to watch and when to tune in will be shared via Pok茅mon Go social channels on July 9. Throughout the day, several notable content creators will also be going live to join in on the festivities."
paragraphs.cn: 「关于观看地点和收看时间的更多细节，将于7月9日通过《宝可梦GO》社交渠道公布。当天，多位知名内容创作者也会开播，一同参与庆祝活动。」

paragraphs.en: It's an interesting time for Pok茅mon Go, which will wrap up its big annual summer event season this weekend already with Go Fest Global. But the summer is still early 鈥?perhaps we'll hear about more surprises coming in the near future?
paragraphs.cn: 对《宝可梦GO》来说，这是一个有趣的时间点。它将在本周末通过Go Fest Global结束年度大型夏季活动季。但夏天才刚开始，也许我们会听到更多即将在不久后到来的惊喜？

paragraphs.en: It's also an interesting time for the Pok茅mon franchise as a whole, which also celebrates a big anniversary this year. While the series is 30 years old, though, it doesn't have a new console game before Christmas with which to celebrate 鈥?remember, of course, that Pok茅mon Winds and Pok茅mon Waves will launch sometime in 2027. Perhaps Pok茅mon Go could be used as a focus for fans once more?
paragraphs.cn: 对整个宝可梦系列来说，这同样是一个有趣的时间点，因为该系列今年也迎来重要周年。虽然宝可梦系列已经30岁，但它在圣诞节前没有一款新的主机游戏用于庆祝；当然别忘了，《宝可梦 风》和《宝可梦 浪》将在2027年的某个时间推出。也许《宝可梦GO》会再次成为粉丝关注的焦点？

paragraphs.en: All may be revealed later this week 鈥?tune in right here on IGN for live coverage as everything unfolds.
paragraphs.cn: 一切也许都会在本周晚些时候揭晓。请继续关注IGN，我们将随着消息公布进行实时报道。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN新闻编辑。你可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系Tom，或在Bluesky上找到他。
